tool_args.label: NYCT Total Revenue Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenues of $399.4 million were $46.9 million (10.5%) lower than the Budget.

tool_args.label: NYCT Farebox Revenue Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT farebox revenue totaled $267.6 million, which was $16.1 million (5.7%) lower than the Budget.

tool_args.label: NYCT Total Ridership Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Total ridership was 117.3 million, which was lower than the Budget by 9.3 million (7.3%).

tool_args.label: NYCT Total Expenses Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses of $1,092.6 million including non-cash liabilities were $18.3 million (1.6%) lower than the Budget.

tool_args.label: NYCT Headcount End of January 2024
tool_args.raw_text: At the end of January, the total headcount was 47,025, which was 2,931 lower than the Budget of 49,957.

tool_args.label: NYCT Farebox Operating Ratio Jan 2024 YTD
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date January Farebox Operating Ratio was 32.9%, which was lower than the Budget.

tool_args.label: NYCT Cost per Passenger Jan 2024 YTD
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date January Cost per Passenger was $7.14

tool_args.label: NYCT Revenue per Passenger Jan 2024 YTD
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date January Revenue per Passenger was $2.35

tool_args.label: SIR Total Revenue Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenues of $0.722 million were $0.521 million (41.9%) lower than the Adopted Budget

tool_args.label: SIR Total Ridership Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Total ridership was 0.190 million, 22.0% lower than the Budget.

tool_args.label: SIR Total Expenses Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses of $8.515 million including non-cash liabilities were $0.357 million (4.0%) lower than the Budget.

tool_args.label: SIR Headcount Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: At the end of January total headcount was 349, which was 73 lower than the Budget of 422.

tool_args.label: SIR Farebox Operating Ratio Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: The January Farebox Operating Ratio was 6.6%

tool_args.label: SIR Cost per Passenger Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: The January Cost per Passenger was $32.44

tool_args.label: SIR Revenue per Passenger Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: The January Revenue per Passenger was $2.13

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Total Revenue Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenues of $14.0 million were $4.8 million (25.5%) unfavorable to the Adopted Budget

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Total Ridership Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Total ridership of 6.8 million was 13.4% lower than the Budget.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Total Expenses Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses of $79.0 million including non-cash liabilities were $24.0 million (23.3%) lower than the Budget.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Headcount Jan 2024
tool_args.raw_text: At the end of January, total headcount was 3,665, which was 243 lower than the Budget of 3,908.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Farebox Operating Ratio Jan 2024 YTD
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date January Farebox Operating Ratio was 17.8%

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Cost per Passenger Jan 2024 YTD
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date January Cost per Passenger was $10.81

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Revenue per Passenger Jan 2024 YTD
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date January Revenue per passenger was $1.93

tool_args.label: NYCT Farebox Revenue Unfavorable vs Budget
tool_args.raw_text: Farebox revenue was lower by $16.1 million (5.7 %) with Subway farebox revenue lower by $6.5 million (2.9%) and Bus farebox revenue lower by $9.3 million (16.2%).

payload.claim_text: Farebox revenue was lower by $16.1 million (5.7%) with Subway farebox revenue lower by $6.5 million (2.9%) and Bus farebox revenue lower by $9.3 million (16.2%).
payload.subject: NYCT Farebox Revenue

tool_args.label: NYCT Overtime Unfavorable
tool_args.raw_text: Overtime was $19.8 million (53.7%) unfavorable primarily due to vacancy / absentee coverage needs and additional maintenance requirements.

payload.claim_text: Overtime was $19.8 million (53.7%) unfavorable primarily due to vacancy / absentee coverage needs and additional maintenance requirements.
payload.subject: NYCT Overtime

tool_args.label: NYCT Payroll Favorable due to Vacancies
tool_args.raw_text: Payroll was $25.1 million (7.4%) favorable primarily due to vacancies.

payload.claim_text: Payroll was $25.1 million (7.4%) favorable primarily due to vacancies.
payload.subject: NYCT Payroll

tool_args.label: SIR Revenue Unfavorable
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenues of $0.722 million were $0.521 million (41.9%) lower than the Adopted Budget. This decrease was primarily attributed to the unfavorable timing of $0.431 million of capital and other reimbursements and unfavorable farebox/other revenue of $0.090 million.

payload.claim_text: Total revenues of $0.722 million were $0.521 million (41.9%) lower than the Adopted Budget. This decrease was primarily attributed to the unfavorable timing of $0.431 million of capital and other reimbursements and unfavorable farebox/other revenue of $0.090 million.
payload.subject: SIR Total Revenue

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Revenue Unfavorable
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenues of $14.0 million were $4.8 million (25.5%) unfavorable to the Adopted Budget. This was primarily due to lower ridership and lower average fare.

payload.claim_text: Total revenues of $14.0 million were $4.8 million (25.5%) unfavorable to the Adopted Budget. This was primarily due to lower ridership and lower average fare.
payload.subject: MTA Bus Company Total Revenue

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company Labor Favorable
tool_args.raw_text: Labor Expenses: $6.5 million (10.1%) favorable - primarily due to vacancies

payload.claim_text: Labor Expenses were $6.5 million (10.1%) favorable primarily due to vacancies.
payload.subject: MTA Bus Company Labor Expenses

tool_args.label: Preliminary Close - Subject to Adjustment
tool_args.raw_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.

payload.description: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Actuals do not include post-close adjustments which will be captured in subsequent months.
